metadata.title: Advanced Canvas
metadata.description: Supercharge your canvas experience! Create presentations, flowcharts and more!

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "key" property

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "label" property

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "options" property or it is not an array

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing a default option (option with a "value" of null)

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid JSON, repairing through Advanced Canvas:
ast.target: 无效 JSON，修复通过高级画布：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file format to export the canvas as.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher pixel ratios result in higher resolution images but also larger file sizes.
ast.target: 更高的像素比导致更高的分辨率图像，但也导致更大的文件大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will not include the fonts in the exported SVG. This will make the SVG file smaller.
ast.target: 这不会包含 SVG 中的字体。这将使 SVG 文件更小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will add an Obsidian + Advanced Canvas logo to the bottom left.
ast.target: 这将添加 Obsidian + Advanced Canvas 标志。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will obscure any text on your canvas.
ast.target: 这将隐藏画布上的任何文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will make the background of the image transparent.

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Requires a reload to take effect.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Imported edge is not yet loaded :(

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload obsidian to apply the changes.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Metadata node not found or version mismatch. Should have been migrated (but wasn't).

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No start node found. Please mark a node as a start node trough the popup menu.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copied wikilink to node to clipboard.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Updating edges from portals is not supported yet.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Creating edges with both ends in portals are not supported yet.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Core plugin "Properties view" was not found or isn't enabled. Enable it and restart Obsidian.

ast.name: description
ast.source: General settings of the Advanced Canvas plugin.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, new nodes will be aligned to the grid.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a text node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a file node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The minimum size (either width or height) of a node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum width of a node. Set to -1 for no limit.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the font size of e.g. group node titles and edge labels will not increase when zooming out.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add more commands to the canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the cloned node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin between the cloned node and the source node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The step size for expanding the node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make .canvas files compatible with the backlinks and outgoing links feature and show the connections in the graph view.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, edges between file nodes will be treated as links. This means that if file node A.md has an edge to file node B.md in the canvas, file A.md will have a link to file B.md in the outgoing links section and show a connection in the graph view.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frontmatter key to fetch the outgoing edges from. (Keep the default to ensure best compatibility.)

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your nodes with different shapes and borders.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of a text node. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your edges with different path styles.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)

ast.name: description
ast.source: When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default line direction of an edge.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a presentation from your canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a slide.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the persistent z-index of nodes using the context menu.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can move nodes one layer forward or backward.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the aspect ratio of nodes using the context menu.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically resize the height of a node to fit the content.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the auto resize feature will be enabled by default for all nodes.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum height of the node when auto resizing (-1 for unlimited).

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the height of the node will snap to the grid.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encapsulate a selection of nodes and edges into a new canvas using the context menu.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the background grid will be hidden when in readonly mode.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlight outgoing (and optionally incoming) edges of a selected node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, incoming edges will also be highlighted.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select edges connected to the selected node(s) using the popup menu.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Focus on a single node and blur all other nodes.

ast.name: label
ast.source: Always align new nodes to grid

ast.name: label
ast.source: Disable font size relative to zoom

ast.name: label
ast.source: Treat edges between file nodes as links

ast.name: label
ast.source: Enable support for linking to a node using a [[wikilink]]

ast.name: label
ast.source: Update edge style while dragging (Can be very slow)

ast.name: label
ast.source: Show "Set Start Node" in node popup

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use arrow keys to change slides

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides

ast.name: label
ast.source: Hide background grid when in readonly

regex.source: Notice("Reload obsidian to apply the changes.")
regex.target: Notice("重新加载 Obsidian 以应用更改。")

regex.source: Notice("No start node found. Please mark a node as a start node trough the popup menu.")
regex.target: Notice("未找到起始节点。请通过弹出菜单将一个节点标记为起始节点。")
.log("节点已添加 效率：", this.nodeAddedCount / canvas.nodes.size)
.log("节点已更改 效率：", this.nodeChangedCount / canvas.nodes.size)
.log("边已添加 效率：", this.edgeAddedCount / canvas.edges.size)
.log("边已更改 效率：", this.edgeChangedCount / canvas.edges.size)

regex.source: .error("Failed to stringify canvas data using json-stable-stringify:", e)
regex.target: .error("无法使用 json-stable-stringify 序列化画布数据：", e)

regex.source: .error("Failed to stringify canvas data using JSON.stringify:", e2)
regex.target: .error("无法使用 JSON.stringify 序列化画布数据：", e2)

regex.source: .error("Invalid JSON, repairing through Advanced Canvas:", e)
regex.target: .error("无效的 JSON，正在通过高级画布修复", e)

regex.source: .error(`Error while reading CSS rules from ${sheet.href}`, e)
regex.target: .error(`从 ${sheet.href} 读取 CSS 规则时出错`, e)
name: "导出选中的节点为图片"

regex.source: description: "General settings of the Advanced Canvas plugin."
regex.target: description: "高级画布插件的常规设置"

regex.source: description: "The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas."
regex.target: description: "双击画布时将创建的节点类型"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, new nodes will be aligned to the grid."
regex.target: description: "启用时，新节点将与网格对齐。"

regex.source: description: "The default width of a text node."
description: "The default height of a text node."
description: "The default width of a file node."
description: "The default height of a file node."
description: "The minimum size of a node."
description: "When enabled, the font size of e.g. group node titles and edge labels will not increase when zooming out."
regex.target: description: "启用时，组节点标题和边标签的字体大小在缩小时不会增加。"

regex.source: description: "Make .canvas files compatible with the backlinks and outgoing links feature and show the connections in the graph view."
regex.target: description: "使 .canvas 文件兼容反向链接和出站链接功能，并在图谱视图中显示连接。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, edges between file nodes will be treated as links. This means that if file node A.md has an edge to file node B.md in the canvas, file A.md will have a link to file B.md in the outgoing links section and show a connection in the graph view."
regex.target: description: "启用后，文件节点之间的边将被视为链接。这意味着如果画布中文件节点 A.md 有一条边指向文件节点 B.md，文件 A.md 将在出站链接部分显示指向文件 B.md 的链接，并在图谱视图中显示连接关系。"

regex.source: description: "Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown."
regex.target: description: "将高级画布的所有样式属性合并在一个下拉菜单中。"

regex.source: description: "Style your nodes with different shapes and borders."
regex.target: description: "使用不同的形状和边框为节点设置样式"

regex.source: description: "Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)"
regex.target: description: "为节点添加自定义样式设置。"

regex.source: description: "Style your edges with different path styles."
regex.target: description: "使用不同的路径样式为边设置样式。"

regex.source: description: "Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)"
regex.target: description: "为边添加自定义样式设置"

regex.source: description: "The default line direction of an edge."
description: "When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge."
regex.target: description: "启用时，在拖动边时，边的样式将会更新。"

regex.source: description: 'When enabled, the arrow will be rotated to the direction of the edge if the pathfinding method is set to "Direct".'
regex.target: description: '启用时，如果路径规划方法设置为“直线”，箭头将旋转到边的方向。'

regex.source: description: "The resolution of the grid when using the A* path style. The lower the value, the more precise the path will be. But it will also take longer to calculate."
regex.target: description: "使用 A* 路径样式时网格的分辨率。值越低，路径越精确，但计算时间也会更长。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "启用时，A* 路径样式将是圆滑的。"

regex.source: description: `Change the zoom breakpoint (the zoom level at which the nodes won't render their content anymore) on a per-node basis using the ${VARIABLE_BREAKPOINT_CSS_VAR} CSS variable.`
regex.target: description: `使用 ${VARIABLE_BREAKPOINT_CSS_VAR} CSS 变量，基于每个节点更改缩放断点（节点不再渲染内容的缩放级别）。`

regex.source: description: "Change the z-index of nodes using the context menu."
regex.target: description: "使用上下文菜单更改节点的 z 轴层。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can move nodes one layer forward or backward."
regex.target: description: "启用后，您可以将节点向前或向后移动一层。"

regex.source: description: "Add more commands to the canvas."
description: "When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the cloned node."
regex.target: description: "启用时，画布将缩放到克隆的节点。"

regex.source: description: "The margin between the cloned node and the source node."
regex.target: description: "克隆节点与源节点之间的间距。"

regex.source: description: "The step size for expanding the node."
description: "Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu."
regex.target: description: "使用弹出菜单翻转边的方向。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the node popup will be disabled."
regex.target: description: "启用时，禁用节点弹出窗口"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, zooming will be disabled."
description: "When enabled, panning will be disabled."
description: "Automatically resize the height of a node to fit the content."
regex.target: description: "自动调整节点高度以适应内容"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the auto resize feature will be enabled by default for all nodes."
regex.target: description: "启用时，所有节点默认启用自动调整大小功能。"

regex.source: description: "The maximum height of the node when auto resizing (-1 for unlimited)."
regex.target: description: "自动调整大小时节点的最大高度（-1表示无限制）。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the height of the node will snap to the grid."
regex.target: description: "启用时，节点的高度将与网格对齐。"

regex.source: description: "Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized."
regex.target: description: "组节点可以折叠和展开，以保持画布的整洁。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node."
regex.target: description: "启用时，折叠的组在拖动节点时会显示其边框。"

regex.source: description: "Focus on a single node and blur all other nodes."
regex.target: description: "聚焦于单个节点，模糊其他所有节点。"

regex.source: description: "Create a presentation from your canvas."
description: "If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command."
regex.target: description: "如果关闭，您仍然可以使用相应的命令设置起始节点。"

regex.source: description: "The default ratio of the slide. For example, 16:9 is 1200x675 and 3:2 is 1350x900."
regex.target: description: "幻灯片的默认比例。例如，16:9 是 1200x675，3:2 是 1350x900。"

regex.source: description: "The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide."
regex.target: description: "将画布包裹在幻灯片中时，幻灯片的内边距。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends."
regex.target: description: "启用时，演示文稿结束后，视口将重置为原始位置。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode."
regex.target: description: "启用时，您可以使用箭头键在演示模式下切换幻灯片。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can use the PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides in presentation mode (Makes the presentation mode compatible with most presentation remotes)."
regex.target: description: "启用时，您可以使用 PgUp/PgDown 键在演示模式下切换幻灯片（使演示模式与大多数演示遥控器兼容）。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding."
regex.target: description: "启用时，画布将缩放到没有内边距的幻灯片。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting."
regex.target: description: "启用后，呈现时不会限制缩放。"

regex.source: description: "The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation."
regex.target: description: "幻灯片过渡动画的持续时间（以秒为单位）。设置为 0 以禁用动画。"

regex.source: description: "The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide."
regex.target: description: "幻灯片过渡动画的强度。值越高，画布在缩放到下一个幻灯片之前，缩放得越多。"

regex.source: description: "Encapsulate a selection of nodes and edges into a new canvas using the context menu."
regex.target: description: "使用上下文菜单将选定的节点和边封装到一个新的画布中。"
description: "创建通往其他画布的传送门。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the portal will maintain its size when closed."
regex.target: description: "启用时，传送门关闭时将保持其大小。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown."
regex.target: description: "启用时，连接到禁用传送门的边将显示。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the file format to export the canvas as.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择将画布导出为的文件格式。")

regex.target: .setDesc("更高的像素比例会生成更高分辨率的图像，但文件体积也会更大。")

regex.target: .setDesc("这将不会在导出的 SVG 中包含字体。这会使 SVG 文件更小。")

regex.target: .setDesc("这将使图像的背景变为透明。")

regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，"设置起始节点"将显示在节点弹出菜单中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the slide will have padding inside.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，幻灯片内部将有填充。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the viewport will reset after the presentation ends.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，演示结束后视口将重置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the arrow keys will navigate through slides.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，箭头键将用于切换幻灯片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the PgUp/PgDown keys will navigate through slides.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，PgUp/PgDown键将用于切换幻灯片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the slides will zoom without padding.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，幻灯片将没有填充地缩放。")
.setDesc("幻灯片过渡动画的持续时间。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, closed portals will retain their size.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，关闭的门户将保持其大小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，指向禁用门户的边缘将显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The CSS classes used in the canvas.")

regex.target: 双击时创建的节点类型

regex.source: The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas.
regex.target: 在画布上双击时将创建的节点类型。

regex.source: Always align new nodes to grid
regex.target: 始终将新节点对齐到网格

regex.source: When enabled, new nodes will be aligned to the grid.
regex.target: 启用后，新节点将与网格对齐。

regex.source: The default width of a text node.
The default height of a text node.
The default width of a file node.
description: "Create edges that are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point."
regex.target: description: "通过将边拖动到目标节点上而不将其放置在特定的侧边连接点上，创建自动放置在节点最合适一侧的边。"

regex.source: description: 'When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.'
regex.target: description: '启用后，边的“起始”端将始终浮动。'

regex.source: description: "The maximum width of a node. Set to -1 for no limit."
regex.target: description: "节点的最大宽度。设置为 -1 表示无限制。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "启用后，方形路径的边角将变为圆角。"

regex.source: .error('Style attribute is missing the "options" property or it is not an array')
regex.target: .error('式属性缺少“options”属性或其不是数组')

regex.source: .error('Style attribute is missing a default option (option with a "value" of null)
regex.target: .error('样式属性缺少默认选项（值为 null 的选项）

regex.source: The default dimensions of a text node.
regex.target: 文本节点默认的宽度和高度。

regex.source: The default dimensions of a file node.
regex.target: 文件节点默认的宽度和高度。

regex.source: The minimum size (either width or height) of a node.
regex.target: 节点的最小尺寸（宽度或高度）。

regex.source: Enable support for linking to a node using a [[wikilink]]
regex.target: 启用支持使用 [维基链接]] 链接到节点

regex.source: When enabled, you can link and embed a node using [[canvas-file#node-id]].
regex.target: 启用后，您可以使用 [canvas-file#node-id]] 链接和嵌入节点。

regex.source: When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search.
regex.target: 启用后，文件搜索将使用 Obsidian 的原生文件搜索功能。
自动创建文件节点连线

regex.source: Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links.
regex.target: 根据文件节点的前置元数据链接，自动在它们之间创建连接。

regex.source: When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths.
regex.target: 启用后，A* 路径样式将允许对角线路径。

regex.source: Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node.
regex.target: 浮动连接会自动放置在节点最合适的一侧。

regex.source: Change the persistent z-index of nodes using the context menu.
regex.target: 通过右键菜单调整节点的固定Z轴层级。

regex.source: Change the aspect ratio of nodes using the context menu.
regex.target: 通过右键菜单调整节点的宽高比例。

regex.source: Highlight outgoing (and optionally incoming) edges of a selected node.
regex.target: 高亮选中节点的外向边缘（可选高亮内向边缘）。
